title: Authors and Citation
text: Hodge D (2026). ggrefine: Publication-Quality 'ggplot2' Themes. R package version 0.4.0900, https://github.com/davidhodge931/ggrefine.
code: @Manual{,   title = {ggrefine: Publication-Quality 'ggplot2' Themes},   author = {David Hodge},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.4.0900},   url = {https://github.com/davidhodge931/ggrefine}, }

title: Publication-Quality ggplot2 Themes
text: objective ggrefine provide complete themes publication-quality ‘ggplot2’ visualisation. Functions provided modify based positional axis scales orientation particular plot.

title: Publication-Quality ggplot2 Themes
text: Install CRAN, development version GitHub.

title: Publication-Quality ggplot2 Themes
text: themes built work refine functions axis panel grid elements. can also customised easily. theme_grey theme_greyer functions different smart panel_grid_colour defaults derived panel_background_fill. ensure ggrefine theme_* functions preferred ggplot2 functions: run library(ggrefine) ggplot2 library loaded, use conflicted::conflict_prefer_all(winner = "ggrefine"), load ggrefine, instead use ggrefine::theme_grey() etc.
code: library(ggplot2) library(ggrefine)  p_base_light <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = hwy)) +   geom_histogram(     stat = "bin", shape = 21,     colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF")   ) +   scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)))  p_base_dark <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = hwy)) +   geom_histogram(     stat = "bin", shape = 21,     colour = blends::screen("#357BA2FF")   ) +   scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)))  p_light  <- p_base_light + theme_light() + labs(title = "theme_light") p_dark  <- p_base_dark  + theme_dark() + labs(title = "theme_dark") p_grey <- p_base_light + theme_grey() + labs(title = "theme_grey") p_greyer <- p_base_light + theme_greyer() + labs(title = "theme_greyer")  patchwork::wrap_plots(   p_light,   p_dark,   p_grey,   p_greyer )

title: Publication-Quality ggplot2 Themes
text: series refine functions provided. premise useful set themes axis panel grid elements - adjust depending positional axis scales orientation particular plot. refine functions organised named : axis: classic_*, modern_*, minimal_*, void_*. panel grid: *_drift, *_flow, *_drop, *_keep. functions remove particular axis panel grid components different positional scales (intended orientation plot).
code: set_theme(new = theme_light(   panel_grid_colour = jumble::grey,   axis_line_colour = jumble::red, ))  p_continuous <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = displ, y = hwy)) +   geom_point(shape = 21, colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF"))  p_discrete_x <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = drv, y = hwy)) +   geom_jitter(shape = 21, colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF"))  p_discrete_y <- mpg |>   ggplot(aes(x = hwy, y = drv)) +   geom_jitter(shape = 21, colour = blends::multiply("#357BA2FF")) patchwork::wrap_plots(   p_continuous + classic_drift() + labs(title = "classic_drift"),   p_discrete_x + classic_drift(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + classic_drift(discrete = "y"),    p_continuous + classic_flow() + labs(title = "classic_flow"),   p_discrete_x + classic_flow(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + classic_flow(discrete = "y"),    p_continuous + classic_drop() + labs(title = "classic_drop"),   p_discrete_x + classic_drop(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + classic_drop(discrete = "y"),      p_continuous + classic_keep() + labs(title = "classic_keep"),   p_discrete_x + classic_keep(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + classic_keep(discrete = "y"),    ncol = 3 ) patchwork::wrap_plots(   p_continuous + modern_drift() + labs(title = "modern_drift"),   p_discrete_x + modern_drift(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + modern_drift(discrete = "y"),    p_continuous + modern_flow() + labs(title = "modern_flow"),   p_discrete_x + modern_flow(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + modern_flow(discrete = "y"),    p_continuous + modern_drop() + labs(title = "modern_drop"),   p_discrete_x + modern_drop(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + modern_drop(discrete = "y"),    p_continuous + modern_keep() + labs(title = "modern_keep"),   p_discrete_x + modern_keep(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + modern_keep(discrete = "y"),    ncol = 3 ) patchwork::wrap_plots(   p_continuous + minimal_drift() + labs(title = "minimal_drift"),   p_discrete_x + minimal_drift(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + minimal_drift(discrete = "y"),    p_continuous + minimal_flow() + labs(title = "minimal_flow"),   p_discrete_x + minimal_flow(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + minimal_flow(discrete = "y"),    p_continuous + minimal_drop() + labs(title = "minimal_drop"),   p_discrete_x + minimal_drop(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + minimal_drop(discrete = "y"),      p_continuous + minimal_keep() + labs(title = "minimal_keep"),   p_discrete_x + minimal_keep(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + minimal_keep(discrete = "y"),    ncol = 3 ) patchwork::wrap_plots(   p_continuous + void_drift() + labs(title = "void_drift"),   p_discrete_x + void_drift(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + void_drift(discrete = "y"),    p_continuous + void_flow() + labs(title = "void_flow"),   p_discrete_x + void_flow(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + void_flow(discrete = "y"),    p_continuous + void_drop() + labs(title = "void_drop"),   p_discrete_x + void_drop(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + void_drop(discrete = "y"),      p_continuous + void_keep() + labs(title = "void_keep"),   p_discrete_x + void_keep(discrete = "x"),   p_discrete_y + void_keep(discrete = "y"),    ncol = 3 )

title: Publication-Quality ggplot2 Themes
text: package part group related packages built extend ggplot2.

title: Classic drift refine — classic_drift
text: Removes axis ticks discrete axes. Removes panel gridlines orientation axis least one axis discrete.

title: Classic drift refine — classic_drift
text: ... Reserved future extensions. Placed first later arguments must named, support trailing commas calls. discrete Character scalar describing axes treated discrete refinement purposes: "none", "x", "y", "". orientation Character. primary axis interest: "x" "y". affects grid modes *_drift() *_flow(). NULL (default), orientation inferred discrete: "y" gives "y", otherwise "x".

title: Classic drift refine — classic_drift
text: ggplot2 theme object

title: Classic drop refine — classic_drop
text: Removes axis ticks discrete axes removes panel gridlines.

title: Classic drop refine — classic_drop
text: ... Reserved future extensions. NULL (default), orientation inferred discrete: "y" gives "y", otherwise "x".

title: theme_dark—————————————————————— — theme_dark
text: complete theme dark plot panel background. plot background defaults "black", panel grid colour defaults plot_background_fill.

title: theme_dark—————————————————————— — theme_dark
code: theme_dark(   ...,   text_size = 10,   text_family = "",   text_colour = flexoki::flexoki$base["base200"],   title_size = NULL,   title_family = NULL,   title_colour = NULL,   subtitle_size = NULL,   subtitle_family = NULL,   subtitle_colour = NULL,   caption_size = NULL,   caption_family = NULL,   caption_colour = NULL,   caption_hjust = 0,   legend_place = "right",   legend_axis_line_colour = NULL,   legend_axis_line_linewidth = NULL,   legend_background_fill = NULL,   legend_key_fill = NULL,   legend_ticks_colour = NULL,   legend_ticks_linewidth = NULL,   legend_ticks_length = grid::unit(c(2.75, 0), "pt"),   axis_line_colour = NULL,   axis_line_linewidth = 0.2,   axis_ticks_colour = NULL,   axis_ticks_linewidth = NULL,   axis_ticks_length = grid::unit(3.66, "pt"),   panel_background_fill = flexoki::flexoki$base["base950"],   panel_grid_colour = NULL,   panel_grid_linetype = 1,   panel_grid_linewidth = 1,   panel_grid_minor_linetype = 1,   panel_grid_minor_linewidth = 0.5,   plot_background_fill = "black",   panel_widths = NULL,   panel_heights = NULL )

title: theme_dark—————————————————————— — theme_dark
text: ... Require named arguments (support trailing commas). text_size base size text theme element. Defaults 10. text_family base family text theme element. Defaults "". text_colour base colour text theme element. title_size size plot.title theme element. Defaults text_size. title_family family plot.title theme element. Defaults text_family. title_colour colour plot.title theme element. Defaults text_colour. subtitle_size size plot.subtitle theme element. Defaults text_size. subtitle_family family plot.subtitle theme element. Defaults text_family. subtitle_colour colour plot.subtitle theme element. Defaults text_colour. caption_size size plot.caption theme element. Defaults text_size. caption_family family plot.caption theme element. Defaults text_family. caption_colour colour plot.caption theme element. Defaults text_colour. caption_hjust horizontal justification plot.caption theme element. Defaults 0. legend_place place legend. Either "right", "top" "bottom". legend_axis_line_colour colour legend.axis.line theme element. legend_axis_line_linewidth linewidth legend.axis.line theme element. legend_background_fill fill (colour) legend.background theme element. legend_key_fill fill (colour) legend.key theme element. legend_ticks_colour colour legend.ticks theme element. legend_ticks_linewidth linewidth legend.ticks theme element. legend_ticks_length length legend.ticks.length theme element. axis_line_colour colour axis.line theme element. Defaults text_colour. axis_line_linewidth linewidth axis.line theme element. axis_ticks_colour colour axis.ticks theme element. axis_ticks_linewidth linewidth axis.ticks theme element. axis_ticks_length length axis.ticks.length theme element. panel_background_fill fill (colour) panel.background theme element. panel_grid_colour colour panel.grid theme element. panel_grid_linetype linetype panel.grid.major theme element. panel_grid_linewidth linewidth panel.grid.major theme element. panel_grid_minor_linetype linetype panel.grid.minor theme element. panel_grid_minor_linewidth linewidth panel.grid.minor theme element. plot_background_fill fill (colour) plot.background theme element. panel_widths panel.widths theme element. unit unit vector setting width individual panels, single unit total panel area width. Overrides aspect ratio set theme, coord, facets. Defaults NULL. panel_heights panel.heights theme element. unit unit vector setting height individual panels, single unit total panel area height. Overrides aspect ratio set theme, coord, facets. Defaults NULL.

Defaults text_colour. axis_line_linewidth linewidth axis.line theme element. axis_ticks_colour colour axis.ticks theme element. axis_ticks_linewidth linewidth axis.ticks theme element. axis_ticks_length length axis.ticks.length theme element. panel_background_fill fill (colour) panel.background theme element. panel_grid_colour colour panel.grid theme element. panel_grid_linetype linetype panel.grid.major theme element. panel_grid_linewidth linewidth panel.grid.major theme element. panel_grid_minor_linetype linetype panel.grid.minor theme element. panel_grid_minor_linewidth linewidth panel.grid.minor theme element. plot_background_fill fill (colour) plot.background theme element. panel_widths panel.widths theme element. unit unit vector setting width individual panels, single unit total panel area width. Overrides aspect ratio set theme, coord, facets. Defaults NULL. panel_heights panel.heights theme element. unit unit vector setting height individual panels, single unit total panel area height. Overrides aspect ratio set theme, coord, facets. Defaults NULL.

title: Void drift refine — void_drift
text: Removes axis lines, ticks, minor ticks, removes axis text axis titles. Removes panel gridlines orientation axis least one axis discrete.

title: Void drift refine — void_drift
text: ... Reserved future extensions. Placed first later arguments must named, support trailing commas calls. discrete Character scalar describing axes treated discrete refinement purposes: "none", "x", "y", "". orientation Character. primary axis interest: "x" "y". affects grid modes *_drift() *_flow(). NULL (default), orientation inferred discrete: "y" gives "y", otherwise "x".
